title: Fabripresence
description: Configurable Discord Rich Presence for Fabric
body: **Fabripresence is a mod which adds Discord Rich Presence to the Fabric Mod Loader for Minecraft**. It is extremely *customizable*, and can be used in modpacks. You can customize it from the **button in the options menu**, or from the **config file** (you can hide the button in the options menu from this file too).
